text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dash!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'm going to get stroooong! Bit by biiiit!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew... How was that, Trainer?
choice_data_list: That was a great run, Meisho Doto!
That was a great run, Meisho Doto!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's yet to have entered her growth period, but
she's steadily showing signs of improvement. If we
keep this up...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I just have to become race-ready now... Do you
think... do you think Opera O will approve of me
by spring?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... Please wait for me, Opera O... I'll be at
your side soon...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The winner of next year's Classic races is still a
toss-up. If her form develops in time, catching up
with T.M. Opera O could be possible.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Doto! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Fukukitaru? What's the matter?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I've got a message for you! I read your horoscope,
but the result was incredibly unfortunate.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Look to the sky and be in awe—in the west is born
a new star. Though it is one, it appears as two, a
mysterious double star!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That new star will outshine the golden star,
posing a threat to you and many other
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: New star... double star? What does...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile, at Hanshin Racecourse...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Victory goes to Admire Vega, the brilliant star of
hope! She bursts past the competition,
dominating the graded races!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Another candidate joins the running to be
crowned the leading act of the Classics! Where
will we see that solemn, stoic run of hers next?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I've yet... to fulfill my promise. I must go...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: East, to the skies of Fuchu.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, no, no, class is about to start! I need to
hurry up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Gyaah?! I'm so sorry! I'm always running into
people...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(Huh, they're perfectly... fine? Usually when I
crash into someone, they go flying into a wall.)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: (Wait... I know who that is!)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Just... pay better attention to what's in front of
you.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Y-y-yes! Sorry about that, Admire Vega... I
mean... Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um... I s-saw you running on UmaTube the other
day. You were so cool and... terrifyingly fast!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm not here to have fun.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'm not running for the fun of it. That's probably
why you found me scary.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I can't... afford to lose. Bye.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, okay...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Doto! Are you well?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, Opera O, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
That was Admire Vega just now... or Ayabe. She's
our peer—and a very strong racer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah yes, I do remember seeing her name on my
casting list. My Overlord radar was rung by her
presence in a race not long ago.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I'm positive that in time our paths will cross on
the big stage. O, Ayabe, Ayabe! Wherefore art
thou Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um, Trainer... I'd like to talk to you about
something.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I bumped into Ayabe earlier, but she didn't budge
an inch, despite how slim she is.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Instead, I'm the one who went tumbling. If that's
what it means to have a strong body, I have a
long way to go...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega—Calm and collected in her solitude,
she's a new star who takes pride in her swift step.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A strong rival has appeared on the scene, shaking
things up for Meisho Doto and T.M. Opera.
